name: Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')
description: The product attempts to access a file based on its filename, but does not properly prevent that filename from being a symbolic link, hard link, or shortcut that resolves to an unintended resource outside the intended directory or access scope.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides a filename that could be a symlink, hardlink, or junction point, which flows to STORAGE[file_access] performing open/read/write/delete without a CONTROL node that checks whether the resolved target is within the intended directory (lstat before open, O_NOFOLLOW, realpath validation)
